title: Best Time In Years To Buy These Core Dividend Growth Stocks
text: The Russian invasion of Ukraine seems to have set off a reinvigorated bout of volatility in the markets.

title: Is Now A Good Time To Invest In Value Stocks? Consider Snap-On And Comcast
text: Despite chatter about a rotation to Value, true value remains very hard to find in the current market. We discuss the many factors beyond P/E, P/S, and P/B that go into making a stock a true value buy.

title: Snap-on Incorporated (SNA) CEO Nick Pinchuk on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Snap-on Incorporated (SNA) CEO Nick Pinchuk on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Snap-on (SNA) Exceeds Earnings and Sales Estimates in Q4
text: Snap-on's (SNA) Q4 results gain from solid sales, the RCI plan and cost-cutting actions. It also progresses well beyond the pre-pandemic level of 2019 for the sixth successive time.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio January Update: New Year Brings New Bargains
text: 2022 is shaping up to be a great year for dividend growth investing. Current projected income stands at $14,842. I have begun selling covered calls against certain positions.

title: Is It Time To Snap Up Some Snap-on?
text: Shares of Snap-on Incorporated (NYSE: SNA) lost their luster in the second half of 2021 but those times may be over. After bobbing along at the $215 level for the last 8 months the company is presenting a deep-value/high-yield combination supported by revenue growth and widening margins in a world where growth and margin improvement is hard to come by.

title: Snap-On (SNA) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Snap-On (SNA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 11.11% and 0.95%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For February 2022
text: I present my top 10 High Yield dividend stocks that are poised to offer strong future returns. The annualized rate of return for this watchlist is 40.16% over the past 15 months.
